data.title: 8月31日紧急维护期间未领取付费物品登录奖励的补偿
data.summary: [Compensation for Unreceived Paid Item Login Rewards during the August 31 Emergency Maintenance] Hel
data.body:
[Compensation for Unreceived Paid Item Login Rewards during the August 31 Emergency Maintenance]

Hello, this is Blue Archive.

Due to the extended emergency maintenance carried out on 8/31(Sun), some Senseis who purchased the Monthly Pyroxene Package, Half-Monthly Pyroxene Package, or 2-Week AP Package were unable to receive their daily login rewards. We would like to inform you that the compensation has now been delivered.

- Eligible Users: Senseis who purchased the above packages and were within the login reward period between 8/30 (Sat) 7:00 PM – 8/31 (Sun) 7:00 PM (UTC), but were unable to log in due to the maintenance.

Applicable Products: Monthly Pyroxene Package / Half-Monthly Pyroxene Package / 2-Week AP Package

- Compensation Details: One day’s worth of login rewards for the applicable package(s).

- Distribution Schedule: Sent sequentially via in-game mail starting from 9/2(Tue) 8:00 AM (UTC) upon login within 7 days.

(Mail will be stored for 30 days from the delivery date.)

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused to your purchased items due to the prolonged emergency maintenance.

Please make sure to log in and claim your compensation before the mail expires.

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3125050&allBoard=1

#BlueArchive

![Gz6MVRlbUAAyqWl.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/443/8IHTVsg72E27U45ttx2nvDIqlx3Ec4GN.jpg)
